brand_identity.description: A modern bakery e-commerce experience that feels like walking into a sunlit artisan patisserie. The product is the hero, surrounded by warm earthy tones and elegant typography.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3, and stylistic brand elements. Keep letter spacing tight on large sizes.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, buttons, and functional text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to let product photography breathe.

grid_patterns.hero: Asymmetrical split or overlapping content. Example: Large image taking 60% width, text taking 40% with negative margin to overlap.
grid_patterns.product_grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8 or gap-12. No tight cramming.
grid_patterns.bento_categories: Use Mode A 'Tetris' Grid for category showcases with varied spans (col-span-2 row-span-2, etc).

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/85 border-b border-[#E3DCCF] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.product_cards: Minimalist. No heavy shadows. Flat solid #FFFFFF background, rounded-2xl, subtle 1px border border-[#E3DCCF]. Image at top with aspect-square object-cover, text padded with p-4 or p-6.

components.strategy: Hybrid: Pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing/category layouts. Heavily customized Shadcn UI for interactive elements (Dropdowns, Tabs, Modals, DatePicker for delivery, Select).

buttons.primary: bg-[#C25934] text-white hover:bg-[#A84C2A] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2D241E] text-[#2D241E] hover:bg-[#2D241E] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

components.forms: Inputs should have rounded-xl, border-[#E3DCCF], focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C25934]/20 focus:border-[#C25934]. Background #FFFFFF.
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider bg-[#F2D780] text-[#2D241E]

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Product cards: image slightly scales up (scale-105) within hidden overflow. Shadow increases to shadow-lg.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-300 ease-out for all hover states.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade up text staggers. Image scale down from 110% to 100% on load.

hero_backgrounds.description: Delicious variety of freshly baked breads and pastries. Use as the main hero background or large featured image.

about_section.description: Baker presenting an assortment of fresh pastries. Use in the 'About Us' or 'Our Craft' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a fully functional E-commerce website for a Bakery.

Environment Constraint: The prompt requests Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript, however, your project environment is React + Tailwind + FastAPI + Shadcn. Please construct the frontend using React/Tailwind/Shadcn to maintain compatibility with the environment's tools, but make it structurally clean.
Include Pages: Home, Shop, Product Details, Cart, Checkout, Login/Register, Order Confirmation, Contact, Admin Panel.
Implement product filtering, search, and a minimum 50+ product seed data generation.
Implement Cart, Wishlist, Reviews & Ratings, Coupon/discount system, and Delivery date selection.
Payment options: COD, UPI, Netbanking (Mock the gateway UI).
Email notifications: Mock the Nodemailer/SMTP flow with console logs or an API endpoint that logs the email.
Admin Panel: Manage products and orders.
Apply the Light Theme Organic & Earthy archetype colors explicitly.
Ensure generous spacing (p-8 to p-16) and asymmetrical bento grids for marketing sections.
Use 'Playfair Display' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Install or import them via Google Fonts.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Never use placeholder URLs for images. Use the provided media URLs or other high-quality Pexels/Unsplash URLs for seeding the 50+ products.
For the logo, use a typographic text logo with the H1 font (e.g. 'Artisan Bakery').
